title: old flow full unlock entry my
implemented: Rebuilt full-unlock WXML/WXSS as the old-flow unlock page with header, generated basic-analysis hero card, 2x2 locked benefits, 9.9 yuan local mock payment panel, compliance assurance copy, and visible decline path.
Rebuilt full-report-entry WXML/WXSS as the old-flow complete-report entry with hero status, four report-content rows, view/save/home actions, and reference-matched bottom controls.
Rebuilt my WXML/WXSS as the old-flow profile/menu/tab page while preserving reports, orders, purchases, feedback, new analysis, and tab actions.
Added miniapp Page-branch navigation mappings for full-unlock back and my purchases/copy actions without changing the Node page-state service bindings.

verification.evidence: scripts/run-tests.mjs requires all selectors to match a single test group; no group has all three tags.

verification.command: npm.cmd run visual:scoremap -- full-unlock full-report-entry my
verification.evidence: T14 visual harness wrote 6 screen comparisons for requested screens plus paired harness dependencies.
Exited 0; Git reported existing LF-to-CRLF normalization warnings only.

knownLimitations: The exact combined npm test selector cannot pass without changing the repository test runner grouping, which is outside the T38 allowed file list.
The visual harness does not claim pixel-perfect screenshot PASS; it returns PASS_NEEDS_MANUAL_UI_REVIEW by design.
